30 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Dragon Head is demonic. It temporarily swallows the Sun
causing Solar Eclipse. So astrologically Dragon Head is
considered to be an enemy of Sun. Thus in Astrology it is
considered that Sun is inimical to above mentioned 3 planets
namely Venus. Saturn and Dragon Head.
Friendly planets of Sun are :-
Mercury (intellect),
Dragon Tail (Liberation),
Jupiter (Guide) and
Mars (power).
MOON
Moon is the causitive planet of mind, water, mother-in-law.
(Venus stands for daughter-in-law). Dragon Head representing
clouds is inimical to Moon, because clouds can cover up the Moon
and make him dull. Astrologically Dragon Head can cover up the
Natal Moon which is the causitive planet of mind and make the
Native's mind dull and eclipsed.
Also Dragon Head is Mayakaraka causing illusions and is
of Demonic, temperament.
